description: Enter compensation details for the employee's job.
paymentUnitDescription: The period over which the compensation amount is tracked (e.g., hourly, daily, weekly, monthly, annually).
adjustForMinimumWageDescription: Determines whether the compensation should be adjusted for minimum wage. Only applies to Nonexempt employees.
minimumWageDescription: What minimum wage requirement should compensation be adjusted to
twoPercentShareholderLabel: Select if employee is a 2% shareholder
stateWcCoveredDescription: Washington administers workers' compensation insurance to protect workers and employers from the financial impact of a work-related injury. Indicate here if this employee is exempt from the workers' comp tax.
stateWcCoveredNo: No, this employee is not covered
stateWcClassCodeDescription: The risk class code associated with this employee's job function.

rate.RATE_EXEMPT_THRESHOLD: FLSA Exempt employees must meet the salary threshold

minimumWageId.REQUIRED: Please select minimum wage for adjustment

stateWcClassCode.REQUIRED: Please select a risk class code
